Test Case Title: Verify Standard User Can Access Inventory After Login
Description: Validate Standard User Can Access Inventory After Login
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Verify user lands on inventory page
Expected: User will be logged in and will be able to access inventory
Actual: User logged in and inventory page displays 6 products

Test Case Title: Verify Successful End-to-End Checkout for Standard User
Description: Validate Successful End-to-End Checkout for Standard User
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Add products from inventory and product detail pages 4. Proceed through checkout 5. Complete purchase
Expected: User successfully completes checkout and sees Thank you for your order page
Actual: Checkout completed successfully from detail and listing pages through order confirmation

Test Case Title: Verify Checkout Completion for Problem User
Description: Validate Checkout Completion for Problem User
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Problem User 3. Add products to cart 4. Proceed to checkout 5. Fill checkout information including Last Name 6. Complete purchase
Expected: Problem User should complete checkout successfully
Actual: Last Name field is not editable and checkout cannot be completed

Test Case Title: Verify Alternate Checkout Flow for Standard User
Description: Validate Alternate Checkout Flow for Standard User
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Add product from product detail page 4. Proceed to cart and checkout 5. Complete purchase
Expected: User completes checkout from product detail page without returning to inventory
Actual: Checkout completed successfully from product detail page only

Test Case Title: Verify Inventory Page Loads Successfully With Delays
Description: Validate Inventory Page Loads Successfully With Delays
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Performance Glitch User 3. Wait for delayed response 4. Verify inventory loads with all products
Expected: Inventory page loads after delay with all products visible
Actual: Inventory page loads after delay and displays 6 products

Test Case Title: Verify Cart Page Loads Successfully With Delays
Description: Validate Cart Page Loads Successfully With Delays
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Performance Glitch User 3. Add products to cart 4. Open cart page 5. Verify items are displayed
Expected: Cart page loads with selected products despite delays
Actual: Cart page displays all selected products

Test Case Title: Verify Mandatory Customer Information Validation
Description: Validate Mandatory Customer Information Validation
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Add products to cart 4. Proceed to checkout 5. Submit with missing fields 6. Verify validation messages
Expected: Validation messages shown for missing mandatory fields
Actual: Validation messages displayed for missing first name last name and postal code

Test Case Title: Verify Checkout Information Page Loads With Delays
Description: Validate Checkout Information Page Loads With Delays
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Performance Glitch User 3. Add products and proceed to checkout 4. Verify checkout information page fields and buttons
Expected: Checkout information page loads with all fields and buttons accessible
Actual: All checkout information fields and Continue and Cancel buttons are visible

Test Case Title: Verify Cart Navigation From Order Confirmation Page
Description: Validate Cart Navigation From Order Confirmation Page
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Add products and proceed through checkout 4. Cancel to inventory 5. Navigate to cart via cart icon 6. Complete order and verify cart icon on confirmation page
Expected: User can navigate to cart from inventory and order confirmation pages
Actual: Cart navigation works from inventory and order confirmation pages

Test Case Title: Verify Successful Logout After Login
Description: Validate Successful Logout After Login
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Open hamburger menu 4. Click Logout 5. Verify redirect to login page
Expected: User is logged out and redirected to login page
Actual: User logged out and redirected to login page

Test Case Title: Verify Locked-Out User Cannot Log In
Description: Validate Locked-Out User Cannot Log In
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Enter locked-out user credentials 3. Click Login 4. Verify error message
Expected: System prevents login and shows locked-out error
Actual: Locked-out error displayed and user remains on login page

Test Case Title: Verify Reset App State From Inventory Page
Description: Validate Reset App State From Inventory Page
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Add products to cart 4. Open hamburger menu 5. Click Reset App State 6. Verify cart badge and product buttons
Expected: Cart badge cleared and Add to Cart buttons restored
Actual: Cart badge cleared but Remove buttons remain on products

Test Case Title: Verify Reset App State From Cart Page
Description: Validate Reset App State From Cart Page
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Add products to cart 4. Open cart page 5. Reset app state from hamburger menu 6. Verify cart contents
Expected: Cart badge cleared and cart emptied
Actual: Cart badge cleared but items remain in cart

Test Case Title: Verify Reset App State During Checkout Information Step
Description: Validate Reset App State During Checkout Information Step
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Add products and proceed to checkout step one 4. Reset app state 5. Continue to order overview
Expected: Order overview shows no products after reset
Actual: Order overview shows zero items after reset on checkout step one

Test Case Title: Verify Reset App State During Order Overview Step
Description: Validate Reset App State During Order Overview Step
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Add products and proceed to order overview 4. Reset app state 5. Attempt to finish purchase
Expected: Cart cleared and purchase cannot be completed
Actual: Items still shown on order overview and purchase can still be completed

Test Case Title: Verify Cart Badge Starts at Zero
Description: Verify cart badge is zero before adding items
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Open inventory page without adding products 4. Verify cart badge count
Expected: Badge count is 0
Actual: Cart badge count is 0 on fresh inventory

Test Case Title: Verify Adding One Product Updates Cart Badge
Description: Verify badge increments when one product added
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Open inventory page 4. Add one product to cart 5. Verify cart badge count
Expected: Badge shows 1
Actual: Cart badge increments to 1 after adding one product

Test Case Title: Verify Adding Three Products Updates Cart Badge
Description: Verify badge shows 3 when three products added
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Open inventory page 4. Add three products to cart 5. Verify cart badge count
Expected: Badge shows 3
Actual: Cart badge shows 3 after adding three products

Test Case Title: Verify Removing Product Decrements Cart Badge
Description: Verify badge decrements when product removed
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Add two products to cart 4. Remove one product 5. Verify cart badge count
Expected: Badge shows 1
Actual: Cart badge decrements to 1 after removing one product

Test Case Title: Verify Cart Badge Hidden When Cart Empty
Description: Verify badge not visible when cart is empty
Steps: 1. Navigate to the application 2. Login as Standard User 3. Open inventory page with empty cart 4. Verify cart badge visibility
Expected: Badge is not rendered
Actual: Cart badge is not visible when cart is empty

Expected: Only remaining product appears through checkout and confirmation
Actual: Removed items absent from cart order overview and confirmation through full checkout

Expected: Order overview updates with all items and checkout completes successfully
